ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer account */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer account */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer account is located */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the account */,
  "current_price" TEXT /* Current price of the product/service being sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product/service being sold */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of customer account (e.g., individual, business) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the customer belongs to */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Primary contact person for the account */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email address */,
  "website" TEXT /* Customer's website */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., manager, sales representative) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Specific position within the role */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager the employee reports to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the manager is responsible for */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the manager is responsible for */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the manager was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the manager was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_representatives" (
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager the sales representative reports to */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the sales representative was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the sales representative was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Employment status (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the sales representative operates in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_representatives_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_representatives_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "region_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_region_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being updated */,
  "new_price" TEXT /* New price of the product */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the update becomes effective */,
  "old_price" TEXT /* Previous price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who created the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_updates_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_updates_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer account that placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who handled the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who created the order */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who last updated the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax" TEXT /* Tax applied to the item */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who created the order item */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who last updated the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being tracked */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock falls below the reorder level */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date of the last restock */,
  "restock_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who last restocked the product */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who created the inventory entry */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who last updated the inventory entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer account being interacted with */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative interacting with the customer */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., phone call, meeting) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the interaction */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for follow-up */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who created the interaction record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who last updated the interaction record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative the target belongs to */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Date the target is set for */,
  "target_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the sales target */,
  "achieved_amount" TEXT /* Amount of sales achieved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the target (e.g., in progress, completed, missed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who created the target */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who last updated the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_targets_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative the task belongs to */,
  "task_date" TEXT /* Date the task is due */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the task */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who assigned the task */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who created the task */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who last updated the task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who sent the notification */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who created the notification */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who last updated the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
